title: P0: coap_dtn.c handlers do not compile - coap_respond undefined, wrong service name lichen_coap vs lichen_coap_server, missing include for COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_*, provider callbacks not integrated with DTN/SenML per spec
close_reason: P0 fixed: s_provider now used in deaddrop_post and deaddrop_get handlers per coap_config.c; coap_respond defined locally; service and codes fixed; SenML/DTN integrated
